data.Modification: Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Cleavage product of EGS protein crosslinks by hydroylamine treatment/Addition of D

project.title: Shotgun proteomics of Frankia alni grown on fumarate
project.projectDescription: Next-generation proteomics of Frankia alni for defining the key proteins involved in growth on fumarate.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein samples were loaded on a SDS-PAGE for a short migration, excised from a single polyacrylamide band, digested by trypsin, and the resulting peptides were analyzed by Q-Exactive HF tandem mass spectrometry.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were analyzed by MASCOT, the results were then parsed with IRMA, spectral counts were compared with PatternLab.

references.referenceLine: Pujic P, Carro L, Fournier P, Armengaud J, Miotello G, Dumont N, Bourgeois C, Saupin X, Jame P, Selak GV, Alloisio N, Normand P. Frankia alni Carbonic Anhydrase Regulates Cytoplasmic pH of Nitrogen-Fixing Vesicles.  Int J Mol Sci. 2023 24(11):9162
